description_long: This is a vintage-style record player cabinet, featuring a wooden exterior with a rectangular form and multiple compartments. The front face displays a control panel with dials, switches, and a slot for vinyl records, as well as a lower storage drawer. The top section houses a turntable platter, visible through an open compartment, with a tonearm and associated wiring. The sides reveal additional mechanical components, wiring, and several loose vinyl records scattered nearby. The back panel is vented, likely for speaker output and heat dissipation, and includes a power cord. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century home audio furniture, combining both functional and decorative elements.
description: A vintage wooden record player cabinet with a control panel, turntable, and storage compartments, featuring visible wiring and loose vinyl records.
description_view_0: The front view shows the control panel with dials, a record slot, and a lower storage drawer, as well as the turntable area on top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the cabinet, the turntable compartment, and the presence of loose vinyl records and wiring.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the vented back panel, power cord, and additional mechanical components inside the cabinet.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the side profile of the cabinet, the turntable area, and the arrangement of the top and lower compartments.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present in the top compartment, circular in shape, and appears to be made of metal or plastic with a matte black finish. It is medium-sized relative to the cabinet, with visible grooves and a central spindle for holding vinyl records. The platter is surrounded by a recessed area, and several vinyl records are seen nearby.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, extending from the side of the turntable area. It is slender, metallic, and features a pivoting joint at its base. The tonearm is positioned above the platter, suggesting it is ready for use.
attribute_control_knobs: Several control knobs and switches are visible on the front control panel. They are round, metallic or plastic, and vary in size. The knobs are arranged in a row, with some labeled and others featuring textured grips for easy adjustment.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of transparent or translucent plastic with a slight blue tint. It is hinged at the back and currently appears to be open, allowing access to the turntable area.
